    C

    ConnectionHandler - Class in edu.iu.jdbc.monitor
    InvocationHandler proxy for Connection that wraps Statement, PreparedStatement, and CallableStatement instances with monitoring proxies.

    Constructor.

    edu.iu.jdbc.monitor - package edu.iu.jdbc.monitor

    iu.util.jdbc.monitor - module iu.util.jdbc.monitor
    JDBC statement monitoring proxies.
    IuJdbcMonitor - Class in edu.iu.jdbc.monitor
    Factory for creating monitored JDBC connection proxies.
    IuJdbcObservableEvent - Class in edu.iu.jdbc.monitor
    IuObservableEvent implementation published by JDBC monitoring proxies.
    IuJdbcObservableEvent(URI, String, String) - Constructor for class edu.iu.jdbc.monitor.IuJdbcObservableEvent
    Constructor.

    L

    LOG - Static variable in class edu.iu.jdbc.monitor.IuJdbcMonitor
    Common logger used by JDBC monitoring invocation proxies.

    M

    monitor(Connection, URI) - Static method in class edu.iu.jdbc.monitor.IuJdbcMonitor
    Wraps a JDBC Connection with monitoring proxies.

    P

    PreparedStatementHandler - Class in edu.iu.jdbc.monitor
    InvocationHandler proxy for PreparedStatement (and CallableStatement) that intercepts execute methods to log SQL text, execution time, and affected row counts, and wraps returned ResultSet instances with monitoring proxies.
    PreparedStatementHandler(PreparedStatement, String, URI) - Constructor for class edu.iu.jdbc.monitor.PreparedStatementHandler
    Constructor.

    R

    ResultSetHandler - Class in edu.iu.jdbc.monitor
    InvocationHandler proxy for ResultSet that counts rows, logs scan progress every 10000 rows, and logs final metrics when the result set is exhausted.
    ResultSetHandler(ResultSet, String, Duration, URI) - Constructor for class edu.iu.jdbc.monitor.ResultSetHandler
    Constructor.

    S

    StatementHandler - Class in edu.iu.jdbc.monitor
    InvocationHandler proxy for Statement that intercepts execute methods to log SQL text, execution time, and affected row counts, and wraps returned ResultSet instances with monitoring proxies.
    StatementHandler(Statement, URI) - Constructor for class edu.iu.jdbc.monitor.StatementHandler
    Constructor.

    W

    wrap(ResultSet, String, Duration, URI) - Static method in class edu.iu.jdbc.monitor.ResultSetHandler
    Wraps a ResultSet with a monitoring proxy.
